step_rationale: Omega-3 PUFA with plaque-stabilizing properties; differentiates erosion from rupture phenotypes.
mechanism: Docosahexaenoic acid, an omega-3 polyunsaturated fatty acid, accumulates differentially in stable versus rupture-prone atherosclerotic plaques and correlates with endothelial erosion.

references.title: Lipidomic Expression Analysis in Carotid Atherosclerotic Disease: A Systematic Review.
Combining metabolomics and OCT to reveal plasma metabolic profiling and biomarkers of plaque erosion and plaque rupture in STEMI patients.
Lipids, Lipoproteins, and Metabolites and Risk of Myocardial Infarction and Stroke.
references.journal: Journal of the American College of Cardiology
